regulation_name: EU Taxonomy Climate Delegated Act — Hotel Sector
description: Hotels >150 rooms must report Taxonomy-aligned % of revenue under SFDR Art 29

regulation_name: UK MEES Regulation Upgrade (EPC Band C)
description: Commercial properties must achieve EPC Band C — 2 UK properties currently Band D

regulation_name: German Energy Efficiency Act (EnEfG) § 4 — Large Buildings
description: Hotels >1000 sqm must have certified ISO 50001 energy management system
Commercial buildings must cut energy use 40% vs 2010 baseline — FR portfolio on track for 28% only

regulation_name: Poland Green Building Standard (REiT Act Amendments)
description: Polish REIT law amendments require hotel owners to publish green building certifications
Participating hotels must meet 3-star sustainability rating — SAR hotels already certified

regulation_name: UAE Hotel Sustainability Framework — Dubai Green Agenda
description: Hotels must hold LEED or Green Key certification — RAD031 and RAD032 not yet certified
CSRD applies to large entities >250 employees — Radisson Group must publish ESRS-compliant report
